---
name: Feature Task
about: Feature, infra work, observability, CI, or hardening task
title: "[feature] <short title here>"
labels: ["type:feature"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal / Why
Describe what we are trying to add or improve, and why it matters.

## Scope
- What needs to change in code, config, infra, or workflow
- Which services/components are touched

## How to Test
Step-by-step instructions to verify locally (docker compose, curl, Airflow trigger, etc.)

## Risk / Notes
- Secrets / credentials / environment assumptions
- Impact on other services
- Rollback considerations

## Milestone
Which milestone this belongs to (ex. "Inference Observability v0.1")
